news.t: Obey Me! Surpasses 8 Million Downloads and Celebrates New Year's With a Special Login Bonus

overview.description: The ProShares UltraShort 7-10 Year Treasury (PST) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the ICE BofA US Treasury (7-10 Y) index. The fund provides 2x inverse daily resetting exposure to a market-value-selected and -weighted index of US Treasury bonds with remaining maturities between 7 and 10 years. PST was launched on May 1, 2008 and is issued by ProShares.

data.title: Obey Me! Surpasses 8 Million Downloads and Celebrates New Year's With a Special Login Bonus
data.text: OSAKA, Japan--(BUSINESS WIRE)--NTT Solmare Corporation's mobile game, Obey Me!, surpasses eight million downloads in 186 countries and regions. To celebrate the achievement and the New Year, the gam...
